doc.body: Seven red apples and two green apples are in the basket.
doc.question: How many apples are in the basket?

arguments:
<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There are 15 trees in the grove. Grove workers will plant trees in the grove today. After they are done, there will be 21 trees. How many trees did the grove workers plant today?<turn|>
<|turn>model
15 tree start. End have 21 tree. So plant 21 - 15 = 6 tree. The answer is 6.<turn|>
<|turn>user
If there are 3 cars in the parking lot and 2 more cars arrive, how many cars are in the parking lot?<turn|>
<|turn>model
3 car in lot. 2 more car come. 3 + 2 = 5 car. The answer is 5.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Leah had 32 chocolates and her sister had 42. If they ate 35, how many pieces do they have left in total?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Leah have 32 chocolate. Sister have 42. Total 32 + 42 = 74. Eat 35. Left 74 - 35 = 39. The answer is 39.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jason had 20 lollipops. He gave Denny some lollipops. Now Jason has 12 lollipops. How many lollipops did Jason give to Denny?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Jason have 20 lollipop. After give some, have 12. Give away 20 - 12 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Shawn has five toys. For Christmas, he got two toys each from his mom and dad. How many toys does he have now?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Shawn have 5 toy. Mom give 2 toy. Dad give 2 toy. Get 2 + 2 = 4 new toy. Now have 5 + 4 = 9. The answer is 9.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There were nine computers in the server room. Five more computers were installed each day, from monday to thursday. How many computers are now in the server room?<turn|>
<|turn>model
9 computer start. Monday to Thursday that 4 day. Add 5 computer each day. 4 * 5 = 20. Total 9 + 20 = 29. The answer is 29.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Michael had 58 golf balls. On tuesday, he lost 23 golf balls. On wednesday, he lost 2 more. How many golf balls did he have at the end of wednesday?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Michael have 58 ball. Lose 23 on Tuesday. 58 - 23 = 35 left. Lose 2 more Wednesday. 35 - 2 = 33 left. The answer is 33.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Olivia has $23. She bought five bagels for $3 each. How much money does she have left?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Olivia have $23. Buy 5 bagel. Each $3. Cost 5 * 3 = 15. Money left 23 - 15 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Seven red apples and two green apples are in the basket. How many apples are in the basket?<turn|>
<|turn>model
resps: 7 red apple + 2 green apple = 9 apples. The answer is 9.

Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There are 15 trees in the grove. Grove workers will plant trees in the grove today. After they are done, there will be 21 trees. How many trees did the grove workers plant today?<turn|>
<|turn>model
15 tree start. End have 21 tree. So plant 21 - 15 = 6 tree. The answer is 6.<turn|>
<|turn>user
If there are 3 cars in the parking lot and 2 more cars arrive, how many cars are in the parking lot?<turn|>
<|turn>model
3 car in lot. 2 more car come. 3 + 2 = 5 car. The answer is 5.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Leah had 32 chocolates and her sister had 42. If they ate 35, how many pieces do they have left in total?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Leah have 32 chocolate. Sister have 42. Total 32 + 42 = 74. Eat 35. Left 74 - 35 = 39. The answer is 39.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jason had 20 lollipops. He gave Denny some lollipops. Now Jason has 12 lollipops. How many lollipops did Jason give to Denny?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Jason have 20 lollipop. After give some, have 12. Give away 20 - 12 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Shawn has five toys. For Christmas, he got two toys each from his mom and dad. How many toys does he have now?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Shawn have 5 toy. Mom give 2 toy. Dad give 2 toy. Get 2 + 2 = 4 new toy. Now have 5 + 4 = 9. The answer is 9.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There were nine computers in the server room. Five more computers were installed each day, from monday to thursday. How many computers are now in the server room?<turn|>
<|turn>model
9 computer start. Monday to Thursday that 4 day. Add 5 computer each day. 4 * 5 = 20. Total 9 + 20 = 29. The answer is 29.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Michael had 58 golf balls. On tuesday, he lost 23 golf balls. On wednesday, he lost 2 more. How many golf balls did he have at the end of wednesday?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Michael have 58 ball. Lose 23 on Tuesday. 58 - 23 = 35 left. Lose 2 more Wednesday. 35 - 2 = 33 left. The answer is 33.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Olivia has $23. She bought five bagels for $3 each. How much money does she have left?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Olivia have $23. Buy 5 bagel. Each $3. Cost 5 * 3 = 15. Money left 23 - 15 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Mrs. Hilt has two pennies, two dimes, and two nickels. Jacob has four pennies, one nickel, and one dime. Who has more money?<turn|>
<|turn>model
resps:
Mrs. Hilt money:
Pennies: 2 * $0.01 = $0.02
Dimes: 2 * $0.10 = $0.20
Nickels: 2 * $0.05 = $0.10
Total for Mrs. Hilt: $0.02 + $0.20 + $0.10 = $0.32

Jacob money:
Pennies: 4 * $0.01 = $0.04
Nickel: 1 * $0.05 = $0.05
Dime: 1 * $0.10 = $0.10
Total for Jacob: $0.04 + $0.05 + $0.10 = $0.19

Comparing the amounts: $0.32 (Mrs. Hilt) is greater than $0.19 (Jacob).

The answer is Mrs. Hilt.

Pennies: $2 \times 1 = 2$ cents
Dimes: $2 \times 10 = 20$ cents
Nickels: $2 \times 5 = 10$ cents

Jacob has:
Pennies: $4 \times 1 = 4$ cents
Nickel: $1 \times 5 = 5$ cents
Dime: $1 \times 10 = 10$ cents

Difference: $32 - 19 = 13$ cents.

The answer is 13 cents.

<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There are 15 trees in the grove. Grove workers will plant trees in the grove today. After they are done, there will be 21 trees. How many trees did the grove workers plant today?<turn|>
<|turn>model
15 tree start. End have 21 tree. So plant 21 - 15 = 6 tree. The answer is 6.<turn|>
<|turn>user
If there are 3 cars in the parking lot and 2 more cars arrive, how many cars are in the parking lot?<turn|>
<|turn>model
3 car in lot. 2 more car come. 3 + 2 = 5 car. The answer is 5.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Leah had 32 chocolates and her sister had 42. If they ate 35, how many pieces do they have left in total?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Leah have 32 chocolate. Sister have 42. Total 32 + 42 = 74. Eat 35. Left 74 - 35 = 39. The answer is 39.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jason had 20 lollipops. He gave Denny some lollipops. Now Jason has 12 lollipops. How many lollipops did Jason give to Denny?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Jason have 20 lollipop. After give some, have 12. Give away 20 - 12 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Shawn has five toys. For Christmas, he got two toys each from his mom and dad. How many toys does he have now?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Shawn have 5 toy. Mom give 2 toy. Dad give 2 toy. Get 2 + 2 = 4 new toy. Now have 5 + 4 = 9. The answer is 9.<turn|>
<|turn>user
There were nine computers in the server room. Five more computers were installed each day, from monday to thursday. How many computers are now in the server room?<turn|>
<|turn>model
9 computer start. Monday to Thursday that 4 day. Add 5 computer each day. 4 * 5 = 20. Total 9 + 20 = 29. The answer is 29.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Michael had 58 golf balls. On tuesday, he lost 23 golf balls. On wednesday, he lost 2 more. How many golf balls did he have at the end of wednesday?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Michael have 58 ball. Lose 23 on Tuesday. 58 - 23 = 35 left. Lose 2 more Wednesday. 35 - 2 = 33 left. The answer is 33.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Olivia has $23. She bought five bagels for $3 each. How much money does she have left?<turn|>
<|turn>model
Olivia have $23. Buy 5 bagel. Each $3. Cost 5 * 3 = 15. Money left 23 - 15 = 8. The answer is 8.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Some oranges were in the basket. Five oranges were taken from the basket. Now there are three oranges. How many oranges were in the basket before some of the oranges were taken?<turn|>
<|turn>model
resps: Three oranges are left. Five oranges were taken. So, the original number was 3 + 5 = 8. The answer is 8.
